news.title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
news.summary: OKX is bringing together payments, identity, and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.

news.title: The AI jobs debate just got messier
news.summary: A new report finds "high-intensity AI adopters” saw headcount increase 10.2%. Among those companies, entry-level headcount rose by 12%, countering the rhetoric that AI kills junior jobs.

news.title: Vibe coding platform Base44 launches own model as AI startups seek defensibility
news.summary: Wix-owned vibe coding platform Base44 has started rolling out its own AI model — with hopes that it will eventually outperform frontier models.

news.title: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
news.summary: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.

news.title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
news.summary: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

news.title: This motor could be the future of e-bikes
news.summary: Imagine an e-bike motor that lets you select your preferred pedaling cadence and then automatically adjusts the gears to keep your legs spinning at that exact speed, no matter how steep the hill gets - all without a fragile derailleur or heavy multi-speed cassette to maintain. Prefer manual control?

news.title: Our best look yet at Samsung’s new wide foldable
news.summary: Samsung is expected to unveil its next generation of foldables at a Galaxy Unpacked event next month, but now we know what they might look like, courtesy of some leaked images published by Android Headlines. news.title: T-Mobile is booting customers from its oldest plans
news.summary: Earlier today, T-Mobile started notifying customers that it will be retiring many legacy plans and moving subscribers onto one of its current rate plans. news.title: South Korea to spend $1T on more memory chip production and humanoid robots
news.summary: South Korea targets physical AI lead and commercial humanoid robots by 2028.

news.title: US renewable boom passes key milestone in April
news.summary: Small-scale solar helped renewables hit nearly triple coal's generation in the US.

news.title: Supreme Court ruling guts government’s use of geofence warrants
news.summary: SCOTUS falls short of deeming geofence warrants unconstitutional, though.

news.title: The 2 Best Slushie Machines of 2026: Now With Soft Serve

news.title: Bitdefender VPN Review: Fast and Affordable Privacy
news.summary: Bitdefender VPN has an excellent starting price, even if it lacks the advanced features that privacy nerds may want.

news.title: Bernie Sanders Saw This Coming
news.summary: For decades, the senator has argued that concentrated wealth threatened American democracy. Now he’s betting that frustration with Big Tech, billionaires, and unchecked AI is reaching a tipping point.

news.title: How Hunter Biden Won the Internet
news.summary: WIRED spent months talking to America’s favorite failson as he plotted his return to public life. Now he’s feeding the trolls—and everyone else.

news.title: Venezuela Earthquake Destruction Revealed in New Satellite Images
news.summary: The maps and images show the extent of destruction and give rescue operations a tool to find any remaining survivors.
